subject: Bump DMaaP DR version
commit_message:
Bump DMaaP DR version

Change-Id: I7a37ab9a69fdb3232f68b908ea97a788fbab55a1
Signed-off-by: efiacor <fiachra.corcoran@est.tech>
Issue-ID: DMAAP-1404
